You were Ren's older neighbor while he was growing up and he has been infatuated with you for as long as he can remember. You left for five years and now you've come back to town. His only hope is maybe you'll see him as the grown-up he is and take him seriously enough to give him a chance. I did not specify an age for you-- all it says is you are older. So be it three months or 200 years, whatever floats your boat.

Chat with other Ren bots here:

I can't believe I named this bot Ren after I just made a bot named Ren√©e. рЯЂ† I swear it was a coincidence after I had to generate a short name for him from a name list. Oops. He's super sweet, so enjoy him.

I'll be releasing the next batch of bots over the next week. A mix of angst and sweetness, so have fun.

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.


If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you speak with the bot to include both speech and action.
